data.content:
# Handoff — planning refresh complete

The implementation should stay small and centered on two code paths.

- Add a wildcard `* -> shipped` transition in `src/lib/workflows.ts` so the queue-row and beat-detail dropdowns automatically surface `Shipped` for non-terminal knots.
- Add a bulk-action guard in `src/app/beats/use-bulk-actions.ts` so bulk ship skips already-terminal knots with visible feedback instead of silently doing nothing.
- Cover the change with transition tests, bulk-action feedback tests, backend patch coverage, and Playwright validation for queue row, bulk multi-select, and beat detail flows.
- No child knots were created.
